title: Jujutsu Craftsen
description: adds jjk/jujutsu kaisen charecters to minecraft, 100% survival friendly,  features a multitude of cursed techniques and an original take on cursed tools
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BaPhj78JK_w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b769ce951b4ba17a7ab2cd8961dcbfe1bc50a7f.png)

Jujutsu Craftsen is a datapack heavily inspired by the Jujutsu Kaisen manga and anime, however it is completly unassociated with Gege Akutami.

Movesets:
**Every Character**
> - Cursed Blow : M1
> - Cursed Focus : Allows you to charge cursed energy for a short period of time, upon landing a hit with cursed focus, land a black flash, doing increased damage while slowing and weakining the enemy, as well as doing greatly increased knockback.

**The Strongest Of Today**
Craftable
> - Reversal Red Max : A red projectile that quickly explodes, gives "I-frames".
> - Lapse Blue Max : Summons a giant blue orb that pulls in nearby enemies that hovers a short distance in your line of sight, does damage, and lasts a moderate period of time.
> - Hollow Purple : After a short windup, combine the red and the blue to shoot out a purple orb destroys everything in it's path.
> - Domain Expansion : Infinite Void  :  Stops all enemies within a large radius nearby from moving, attacking, or mining for a decent period of time.
> - Hollow Purple Nuke : Shooting a reversal red max into a lapse blue max will create a variant of hollow purple that explodes, obliterating everything and everyone nearby, including you.

**The Strongest Of History**
Miniboss Drop
> - Cleave : A short AOE slash attack that constantly slashes anyone caught for high damage over time.
> - Cleave : Spiderweb : Higher ranged version of cleave that instanly does damage in a spiderweb pattern, but has lower damage, you also dash back after using this for great mobility.
> - Dismantle : A weaker ranged slash.
> - Open : Hold to charge up a flaming arrow, the higher charge, the faster it moves, which flies for a bit before exploding in a massive pillar of fire.
> - Malevolent Shrine : Summon a shrine, which slashes all enemies wihting a large radius constantly for a long period of time.

**The Proudest**
Boss Drop
> - Passive : Cursed Blow also inflicts burn.
> - Disaster Flames : Shoot a beam of boiling magma.
> - Ember Insects : Release an army of 4 small burning insects that explode upon hitting someone.
> - Maxium : Meteor  :  Leap into the air and shoot a giant meteor that creates a massive crater upon impact.
> - Coffin of the Iron Mountain : Expand your domain, trapping all nearby in a box where the floor burns them alive.

**Minor Techniques / Cursed Tools**
> - Nanami's Cleaver : Press sneak to activate a short minigame where you must strike while the line is in the middle, the better you do, the stronger ratio attack you do, which slows the enemy and does extra damage. Hitting a black flash allows you to land another with an increased window, allowing you to chain them.
> - Grasshopper wings : Elytra, sneak to spit a poisonous blob, grants immunity to poison while wearing.
> - Cursed speech : Use to freeze all enemies nearby in place, use while sneaking to explode all enemies in a bigger radius.
> - Blood Manipulation : Use to shoot a beam of piercing blood for high damage, use while sprinting to place a blood bomb with a long lifetime, and use while sneaking to explode all blood bombs in a wide range.
> - Onion Skinner : When used whilst not sneaking empower your next attack with the 20 frames, allowing you to rapidly hit the next enemy struck, if used when sneaking, create a path of projections foward, allowing you to move 20 times in a second.
> - Athletic Boots : Grant various stat bonuses while worn, sprint to dash in the direction of movement with a short cooldown.
> - Cursed Focus : Allows you to charge cursed energy for a short period of time, upon landing a hit with cursed focus, land a black flash, doing increased damage while slowing and weakining the enemy, as well as doing greatly increased knockback.


Minibosses:
**Finger Bearer** : Summoned from the Cursed Womb. A strong melee miniboss who shoots powerful explosive cursed blasts, drops the Cursed Finger, which is utilised to unlock The Strongest Of History.

Bosses:
**Jogo** : Summoned from the Ashes of Disaster. Has all the moves of The Proudest moveset. Drops the Cursed Technique : Disaster Flames, which is used to unlock The Proudest.


[Tutorials](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLvyL1jIk2E5XxZu7iidiS2PLsoN2FsaNP)
